task_completion.visual_evidence: The GUI shows the agent has navigated to the 'Projects' workspace (e.g., in a document management system or file explorer).
The 'Whiteboard-Capture' image is visible on the screen, displaying a whiteboard with a project code (PROJ-XXXX), budget, and action items.

task_completion.description: Create a new Note document in the 'Projects' workspace
task_completion.visual_evidence: A document creation screen, text editor, or a newly created Note document is visible within the 'Projects' workspace.

task_completion.description: Title the new Note 'Strategy Meeting Notes'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title field or header of the newly created Note document exactly reads 'Strategy Meeting Notes'.

task_completion.description: Transcribe the Project Code from the image
task_completion.visual_evidence: The body of the Note document contains the exact Project Code (in PROJ-XXXX format) that is visible in the 'Whiteboard-Capture' image.

task_completion.description: Transcribe the action items from the image
task_completion.visual_evidence: The body of the Note document contains the action items (e.g., references to 'Backend Lead', 'Launch Beta') exactly as they appear in the 'Whiteboard-Capture' image.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser or document management GUI, not just terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent actually transcribed the image contents rather than guessing
integrity.visual_evidence: The transcribed text in the Note matches the specific, randomly generated values (Project Code, budget, action items) seen in the image preview, proving the agent read the image.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the application by using a terminal text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The Note was created via the application's standard interface, not by opening a terminal and using nano, vim, or echo to write a file directly to the backend.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target workspace: '/default-domain/workspaces/Projects'. Target note title: 'Strategy Meeting Notes'. Source image name: 'Whiteboard-Capture'. The image contains a synthetically generated whiteboard with a random project code (PROJ-XXXX format), budget amount, and action items including 'Backend Lead' and 'Launch Beta'.
